mapper.select: SELECT * /* TODO: 컬럼 명시 필요 */ FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN , TB.* /* TODO: 컬럼 명시 필요 */ FROM ( SELECT PROGRM_FILE_NM AS "progrmFileNm" , REQUST_NO AS "rqesterNo" , RQESTER_ID AS "rqesterPersonId" , DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(CHANGE_REQUST_CN, 10, 1) || '...' AS "changerqesterCn" , DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(REQUST_PROCESS_CN, 10, 1) || '...' AS "rqesterProcessCn" , OPETR_ID AS "opetrId" , TRIM(PROCESS_STTUS_CODE) AS "processSttus" , TO_CHAR(PROCESS_DE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "processDe" , TO_CHAR(REQUST_DE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "rqesterDe" , REQUST_SJ AS "rqesterSj" FROM TB_PROGRM_CHANGE_DTLS WHERE PROGRM_FILE_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' ) TB ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{firstIndex} + 1 AND #{firstIndex} + #{recordCountPerPage}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "totcnt" FROM TB_PROGRM_CHANGE_DTLS WHERE PROGRM_FILE_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'

SELECT PROGRM_FILE_NM AS "progrmFileNm" , REQUST_NO AS "rqesterNo" , RQESTER_ID AS "rqesterPersonId" , CHANGE_REQUST_CN AS "changerqesterCn" , REQUST_PROCESS_CN AS "rqesterProcessCn" , OPETR_ID AS "opetrId" , TRIM(PROCESS_STTUS_CODE) AS "processSttus" , TO_CHAR(PROCESS_DE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "processDe" , TO_CHAR(REQUST_DE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "rqesterDe" , REQUST_SJ AS "rqesterSj" FROM TB_PROGRM_CHANGE_DTLS WHERE PROGRM_FILE_NM = #{progrmFileNm} AND REQUST_NO = #{rqesterNo}
